headline: Warren Buffett Looks for Value in Today’s Market But Comes Up Empty: ‘Everybody Is Preferring Gambling’
summary: Legendary investor Warren Buffett is no longer the CEO of Berkshire Hathaway Inc, but remains active as Executive Chairman at providing investment ideas for the conglomerate and new CEO Greg Abel. These days, Buffett says its tough to find value...

headline: Interactive Brokers Grew Its Customer Accounts 34% in a Year. Here's the Bull Case Before Q2 Earnings.
summary: Interactive Brokers' business is much bigger than it was a year ago, hinting at a strong second quarter.

headline: Prediction Markets Swell to 27% of Sports Bets During World Cup
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Prediction-market trading has surged during a blowout World Cup, far outpacing the growth at traditional sportsbooks and driving home the competitive threat that companies like Kalshi now pose to the sports-gambling industry.
